name: twilio
description: Send SMS, WhatsApp messages, make calls, and manage communications with Twilio

tools.name: Send SMS
tools.description: Send an SMS text message to a phone number

tools.name: Send WhatsApp Message
tools.description: Send a WhatsApp message to a phone number

tools.name: List Messages
tools.description: List recent SMS and WhatsApp messages

tools.name: Get Message
tools.description: Get details about a specific message

prompts.title: Send SMS notification
prompts.prompt: Help me send an SMS notification to a customer about their order status.

prompts.title: Check recent messages
prompts.prompt: Show me the most recent SMS and WhatsApp messages from the last 24 hours.

prompts.title: Call summary
prompts.prompt: Give me a summary of recent calls including duration and status.

prompts.title: WhatsApp outreach
prompts.prompt: Help me draft and send a WhatsApp message for customer outreach.

setupGuide.title: Setting up Twilio Integration

steps.title: Create a Twilio Account
steps.description: Sign up for a free Twilio account at https://www.twilio.com/try-twilio

steps.title: Get Your Account SID and Auth Token
steps.description: Navigate to the Twilio Console Dashboard. Your Account SID and Auth Token are displayed on the main dashboard page. Click the eye icon to reveal your Auth Token.

steps.title: Get a Phone Number
steps.description: Go to Phone Numbers > Manage > Buy a number. Select a phone number with SMS and Voice capabilities. Trial accounts come with one free phone number.

steps.title: Set Up WhatsApp (Optional)
steps.description: To send WhatsApp messages, join the Twilio Sandbox for WhatsApp. Go to Messaging > Try it out > Send a WhatsApp message. Follow the instructions to connect your WhatsApp to the sandbox.

steps.title: Add Environment Variables
steps.description:
Add your Twilio credentials to your .env file:
- TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID=ACxxxxx
- TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN=your_auth_token
- TWILIO_PHONE_NUMBER=+1234567890

steps.title: Test the Integration
steps.description: Try sending a test SMS using the send-sms tool. For trial accounts, you can only send messages to verified phone numbers. Add your phone number at Phone Numbers > Manage > Verified Caller IDs.

notes: Trial accounts have limitations: you can only send messages to verified phone numbers
All trial messages will be prefixed with 'Sent from your Twilio trial account'
WhatsApp messages require recipients to first opt-in by messaging your sandbox number
Phone numbers must be in E.164 format: +[country code][number] (e.g., +14155552671)
Upgrade your account to remove trial restrictions and enable production features
